query:
-- Check which invoice phone numbers already exist in the DB
SELECT externalId, phoneNumber, planName, monthlyCost, status, customerExternalId, supplierAccount
FROM services
WHERE provider = 'Telstra' AND serviceType = 'Mobile'
  AND supplierAccount = '586992900'
ORDER BY phoneNumber
LIMIT 50;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute
